violations.text: Inspector observed cheese with mold. PIC volntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

Inspector observed cheese, roast beef, and chili being stored in walk in cooler with dates exceeding the 7 day datemarking.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
Various food packaged in establishment is lacking major allergens. PIC informed and added allergens to labels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (butter) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025

(Various packaged foods and cookies ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking completed labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address.PIC informed and added ingredients to labels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints and beard guards. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles.Hair restraints were given. PIC informed facial hair(beards must be restrained. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025

The floors in dry storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (throughout the establishment). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the womens restroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

(The prep unit ) located in the (grill station ) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed at 50DF. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food products in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (slicer and steam table shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
The water pressure at the handwashing sink in kitchen has inadequate water pressure. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

The floors under ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
